name: Text.TextAttributes
summary: The TextAttributes class is the attributes class for the text.

constructors.name: Text.TextAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new default text attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: Text.TextAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new text attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

params.name: attributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: Alignment
properties.summary: The text object's alignment (left, center, right).

properties.name: Angle
properties.summary: The angle of the text frame.

properties.name: ArrowHead
properties.summary: The arrowhead of the leader line.

properties.name: CustomPresentation
properties.summary: Custom presentation GUID to be applied to the object type

properties.name: PlacingAttributes
properties.summary: The placing attributes that the object should use. Using these you can specify whether the object is automatically arranged in the drawing or not.

properties.name: PreferredPlacing
properties.summary: The type of placing the object should use. See the preferred placing types for different types of placing.

properties.name: RulerWidth
properties.summary: Gets or sets the width in paper coordinates of the ruler to be used in word wrapping.

properties.name: TransparentBackground
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the background transparency is enabled for texts.

properties.name: UseWordWrapping
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to [use word wrapping].
